subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest in mountain and desert! Thy letter hath reached us, and we are fully aware of thy toils, hardships and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوه و بیابان مکتوبت واصل و بر کیفیت مشقت و زحمت و عسرت واقفیم معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom
